description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the danlynn/ember-cli:2.18.0 Docker image and runs npm install as a before_script for all jobs. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs ember test on a runner tagged docker. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only for Git tags, is manual, sets the production environment, writes the $NPM_CREDENTIALS secret to ~/.npmrc and executes npm publish, also runs on a docker‑tagged runner.
